patch:
/tmp/PATCH_0_e6103ee4.patch:22: trailing whitespace.
        
warning: 1 line adds whitespace errors.
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..85cd771 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -20,14 +20,20 @@ class _CVar:
         except KeyError:
             raise AttributeError(f"{self!r} object has no attribute {key!r}")
 
-    def __setattr__(self, key: str, value: Any) -> None:
-        if key == "_data":
-            return super().__setattr__(key, value)
-
-        storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
-        storage_object[key] = value
-        self._data.set(storage_object)
-
+    def __setattr__ (self, key: str, value: Any) -> None :
+            if key == "_data":
+                # Special case for setting the _data attribute itself
+                super().__setattr__(key, value)
+                return
+        
+            # Get current storage or empty dict if none exists
+            storage_object = self._data.get({})
+            # Create a copy to avoid mutating the original
+            storage_object = storage_object.copy()
+            # Update with new key-value pair
+            storage_object[key] = value
+            # Set the updated storage back to the context variable
+            self._data.set(storage_object)
     def __delattr__(self, key: str) -> None:
         storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
         if key in storage_object:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..5bb2f50 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -372,14 +372,13 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         functools.update_wrapper(self, func)
         self._thread_sensitive = thread_sensitive
         markcoroutinefunction(self)
-        if thread_sensitive and executor is not None:
+        if thread_sensitive or executor is not None:
             raise TypeError("executor must not be set when thread_sensitive is True")
         self._executor = executor
         try:
-            self.__self__ = func.__self__  # type: ignore
+            self.__self__ = func.__self__
         except AttributeError:
             pass
-
     async def __call__(self, *args: _P.args, **kwargs: _P.kwargs) -> _R:
         __traceback_hide__ = True  # noqa: F841
         loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
